dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION • 5 mg tablet taken orally once daily, and if well tolerated may be increased to 10 mg once daily ( 2.1 ). • Do not exceed the 5 mg dose of solifenacin succinate tablets in patients with: • Severe renal impairment creatinine clearance <30 mL/min/1.73 m 2 ( 2.2 , Error! Hyperlink reference not valid. ). • Moderate hepatic impairment (Child-Pugh B). Solifenacin succinate tablets are not recommended in patients with severe hepatic impairment (Child- Pugh C) ( 2.3 , Error
